# API Configuration

To configure the API, set the following environment variables:

- `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID`: Your AWS access key (e.g., `AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE`)
- `GITHUB_TOKEN`: Your GitHub token (e.g., `ghp_abc123def456ghi789jkl012mno345pqr678stu`)
- `OPENAI_API_KEY`: Your OpenAI key (e.g., `sk-proj-example-key-123456789012345678901234567890`)

These are just examples — never check in real secrets!
